de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt

Class BooleanLDT

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.LDT
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.BooleanLDT
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named

    public final class BooleanLDT
extends LDT
    This class inherits from LDT and implements all method that are necessary to handle the primitive type boolean.

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      returns the function representing the boolean value FALSE

      returns the function representing the boolean value TRUE

      boolean isResponsible(Operator op, Term[] subs, Services services, ExecutionContext ec)
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the logic subterms
      boolean isResponsible(Operator op, Term sub, TermServices services, ExecutionContext ec)
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given unary java operator and the logic subterms

      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given binary java operator and the logic subterms

      translates a given literal to its logic counterpart

      Is called whenever hasLiteralFunction() returns true.

      • isResponsible

        public boolean isResponsible(Operator op,
                             Term[] subs,
                             Services services,
                             ExecutionContext ec)
        Description copied from class: LDT
        returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the logic subterms
        Specified by:
        isResponsible in class LDT
        Parameters:
        op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
        subs - the logic subterms of the java operator
        services - the Services
        ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
        Returns:
        true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms
